rationale.fidelity: Faithfully maps binary product inclusion before arrivals, shelf and pick-slot limits, uncertain arrivals and choices, modeled substitution, and expected contribution margin without importing delivery speed or welfare.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly develops the shift trigger, dark-store actor, assortment choices, scarce-capacity stakes, breadth and substitution trade-off, operational mechanism, and feasible offered-set comparisons.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested, and the response appropriately marks literature-relative novelty as provisional rather than asserting it.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels substitution as a model assumption, refuses firm-specific realized-profit and measured-customer-effect claims, states counterconditions, and identifies empirical validation needs.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and organized, but the mode/readiness and all-gates framing creates extra process language and repetition.
rationale.overall: A complete and disciplined assortment framing that avoids every named inference trap.
